steps: Let b = morning loaves. After selling half before lunch, loaves left = b - b/2 = b/2. Then she bakes 10 more: b/2 + 10. End of day total = 34. So equation: b/2 + 10 = 34. Solve: b/2 = 24 → b = 48. Check options: A says b=38 (incorrect), B says b=48 (correct), C uses b-2+10 (wrong), D uses b/2-10 (wrong), E says b=44 (incorrect). Only B matches equation and solution.
